_purpose: Provenance anchor v2: grader floors+weights+occlusion RE-FROZEN here, AFTER the over-veto fix (73d088b) and the collision occlusion fix (4eeb344), BEFORE the human blind-scores the holdout. The grader LOGIC was changed by analysing the holdout clones (self-evident collision catastrophe + folded-content over-veto), but the human SCORES were never seen/used — so the human blind score is still a clean out-of-sample test of whether the FIXED grader tracks human ranking.
supersedes: v1 lock fef5df6 (params + sealed 0/0/0 prediction now STALE — grader fixed twice since)

sealed_prediction_fixed_grader.note: All near-0 — the fixed grader now catches the catastrophic collisions on supabase/linear (collision is a named top disqualifier) and residual recolour/overflow on overreacted. The human blind 0-100 score quantifies whether this tracks human perception.

honesty_note: Strict-formal caveat: the collision LOGIC fix was informed by looking at the holdout clones, so a purist calls these pages 'used' and would want a FRESH holdout for a pristine gate. Mitigations: (1) fix driven by the self-evident visible catastrophe + synthetic injection + perceptual-prior thresholds, NOT any human score (still un-collected); (2) logic not fit-to-labels; (3) floors stay label-blind-noise, weights perceptual-prior. For a 100%-clean gate later, render 1-2 brand-new archetype-diverse holdout pages. For NOW these 3 are a strong (not pristine) out-of-sample signal on the fixed grader.
protocol: Human blind-scores HOLDOUT_SHEET.html (3 pairs, 0-100 + defect ticks), Downloads JSON; then reveal+compare vs sealed_prediction_fixed_grader: ordinal agreement + per-defect recall (did human-ticked defects appear in the grader ledger?) + band. A FAIL is NOT re-tuned-and-reopened on these pages — return to synthetic + render fresh holdout.
